original_abstract: This work investigates the degradation of 5-hydroxymethylfurfural (HMF) in an alkaline electrolyte, enabling “indirect” electrooxidation of HMF at unprecedentedly high substrate and base concentrations at improved atom economy.
humanized_abstract: We investigate the degradation of 5-hydroxymethylfurfural (HMF) in an alkaline electrolyte to achieve the “indirect” electrooxidation of HMF at far higher substrate and base concentrations and with a higher atom economy than ever reported before.

document.output: We investigate the degradation of 5-hydroxymethylfurfural (HMF) in an alkaline electrolyte to achieve the “indirect” electrooxidation of HMF at far higher substrate and base concentrations and with a higher atom economy than ever reported before.
document.input: This work investigates the degradation of 5-hydroxymethylfurfural (HMF) in an alkaline electrolyte, enabling “indirect” electrooxidation of HMF at unprecedentedly high substrate and base concentrations at improved atom economy.
